name: Ask Wall Contra-Directional Signal
hypothesis: A high concentration of ask-side liquidity at the best ask price (`ask_depth_concentration`) forms a resistance wall, predicting a near-term price decrease. The signal is therefore contra-directional: we go long when this concentration is low and short when it is high.
mutation_note: New signal based on Block C smoke tests showing strong contra-directional performance for ask_depth_concentration.
